text:
* Dylan Cochran (a134qaed@gmail.com) wrote:

> diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/zeroinstall-injector/Makefile /usr/ports/devel/zeroinstall-test/Makefile
> --- /usr/ports/devel/zeroinstall-injector/Makefile	2008-11-27 15:53:36.000000000 +0000
> +++ /usr/ports/devel/zeroinstall-test/Makefile	2009-01-15 20:50:39.000000000 +0000
...
> diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/zeroinstall-injector/Makefile /root/zeroinstall-test/Makefile
> --- /usr/ports/devel/zeroinstall-injector/Makefile	2008-11-27 15:53:36.000000000 +0000
> +++ /root/zeroinstall-test/Makefile	2009-01-15 20:50:39.000000000 +0000

Um, something's wrong with this patch - there are 2 diffs actually.
